Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current product details, promotions, and brake parts catalog data to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every marketing email features accurate, up-to-date product information and pricing, eliminating manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email—subject line, body copy, and CTAs—tailored to R1 Concepts' brand voice and current product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces high-quality, on-brand marketing copy daily without a copywriter, saving hours of creative work and maintaining consistent output.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot and sends it to targeted contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates email creation and distribution to segmented audiences, ensuring daily customer touchpoints without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current product listings, promotions, and catalog data from the Dynamic Friction Company website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Guarantees email content reflects the latest DFC inventory and offers, removing the need for manual product research.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with subject line, body content, and calls-to-action aligned with DFC's brand and product focus.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers polished, ready-to-send email copy every day, eliminating the bottleneck of manual copywriting for the DFC brand.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email in HubSpot and dispatches it to DFC contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures consistent daily email outreach to DFC customers with zero manual campaign assembly or scheduling effort.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, issue descriptions, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all support requests into the AI pipeline instantly, ensuring no ticket is missed and response times begin immediately.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextual reply using product knowledge and DFC website reference data.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces agent workload by auto-categorizing issues and producing draft responses, cutting average response time significantly.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI classification and attaches the drafted reply for support team review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support agents receive pre-written, categorized responses they can approve and send in seconds instead of composing from scratch.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all customer return and issue data from Amazon flyer submissions into a single source, eliminating manual data extraction.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue and return data into a structured Google Sheet for team analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a real-time, sortable dashboard of customer issues, enabling fast identification of recurring problems and quality trends.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity events such as website visits, page views, and engagement on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent customer behavior in real time, enabling the sales team to act on warm leads before interest fades.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams messages and email notifications with customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Sales reps receive instant notifications of active customer interest, allowing immediate follow-up and dramatically improving conversion timing.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts, handling inquiries and providing product guidance (currently in development).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Once live, will provide 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and freeing human agents for complex cases.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creators who may not appear on a single platform, expanding the discovery pool.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and content details from YouTube, Instagram, and Google sources.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds a rich, multi-platform dataset on each discovered creator, giving the team comprehensive profiles without manual research.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and ranks discovered creators by relevance, niche alignment, and audience fit using AI-driven keyword matching.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters hundreds of potential creators down to a prioritized shortlist, saving hours of manual vetting and ensuring brand-relevant matches.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, content quality, and niche relevance.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective creator evaluation with a consistent, data-driven scoring system that can be tuned to any campaign's priorities.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt guidelines stored in Google Drive to guide messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures all outreach follows proven sequences and brand guidelines, maintaining consistency across every creator contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences and contextual prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, compelling outreach messages at scale, dramatically increasing the volume of creator contacts without sacrificing personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators directly via Gmail.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the actual sending of outreach, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily with zero manual email composition.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and retrieves full email threads including previous negotiation and conversation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every creator response immediately, ensuring no reply is missed and full conversation context is preserved for AI processing.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations and negotiation patterns from Google Drive to inform response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds each AI response in real negotiation experience, leading to more effective and contextually appropriate replies.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts contextual response emails using learned negotiation tactics and full conversation history to advance creator partnerships.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles ongoing creator negotiations intelligently and at scale, reducing the time spent on back-and-forth while maintaining deal quality.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying items.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability guides, ensuring every qualifying part is captured without human error.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Generates a formatted weekly DFC load sheet and accompanying sales sheet from the matched data.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Produces print-ready, consistent load sheets in seconds rather than the 30+ minutes of manual formatting previously required.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends a HubSpot marketing email containing the sales sheet and load sheet attachments to the Must Have Monday distribution list.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Ensures the weekly MHM email goes out on schedule with accurate attachments, maintaining consistent dealer engagement without manual email assembly.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Posts a confirmation notification to the designated Teams channel with a summary of the load sheet and email send status.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team instantly informed of successful sends, enabling quick review and immediate follow-up if issues arise.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces on-brand, sales-focused email copy in minutes instead of hours of manual copywriting, accelerating time-to-market for new product communications.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates draft First to Market emails in HubSpot with generated copy, sales sheet assets, and proper segmentation for DFC dealer audiences.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers ready-to-review email drafts directly in HubSpot, reducing the full email creation cycle from hours to minutes and ensuring dealers hear about new products first.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including email performance, contact engagement, and funnel stage data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically aggregates CRM performance data that would otherwise require manual export and compilation, ensuring accuracy across all lifecycle stages.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves website traffic metrics from GA4, search performance data from Google Search Console, and SMS campaign metrics from Attentive.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates multi-channel marketing data from four separate platforms into a single data set, saving significant time and eliminating copy-paste errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with formatted charts, tables, and metrics from all collected data sources.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms what was a tedious multi-hour monthly task into an automated slide build, delivering a polished, data-accurate deck section ready for executive review.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current keyword rankings and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts trails competitors in organic search visibility.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-value keyword opportunities that competitors are capturing, enabling a data-driven content strategy instead of guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, including meta descriptions, headers, and internal linking recommendations.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, keyword-targeted content at scale, dramatically increasing content output while maintaining SEO best practices throughout every article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog posts to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization fields populated for maximum search visibility.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates the manual WordPress publishing workflow and ensures every post is fully optimized with Yoast green-light signals before going live.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, line items, expected delivery dates, and vendor details from Dream ERP.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the tedious manual export and review of PO data, ensuring no outstanding orders are missed in the follow-up process.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms PO data into structured contact and deal records in HubSpot, then triggers automated vendor chase email sequences for overdue or pending orders.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Replaces manual vendor follow-up emails with a systematic, automated workflow that ensures every outstanding PO receives timely chase communications, improving delivery compliance.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number data and the New Availability Guide via file upload in a self-contained HTML browser application.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Provides an accessible, no-install tool that any team member can use without requiring technical knowledge or access to external systems.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Matches vehicle part numbers against the availability guide and exports a formatted DFC load sheet as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a clean, formatted load sheet in seconds, enabling on-demand generation without waiting for the full weekly automation pipeline.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the starting point for the new week's campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Eliminates repetitive manual campaign setup steps by replicating the proven template automatically, ensuring brand consistency week over week.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the new vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time for the current week's MHM promotion.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Reduces weekly SMS campaign creation from a multi-step manual process to an automated workflow, freeing marketing resources and ensuring timely, accurate sends.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts historical and recent sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order values, product categories, and order frequency.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Unlocks actionable sales intelligence from raw ERP data, providing the foundation for segmentation, trend analysis, and targeted outreach.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back cohorts, then triggers automated email campaigns for each segment along with dashboard reporting.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue by reaching the right customers at the right time with personalized campaigns, turning dormant accounts into repeat buyers and increasing average order value.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to segmented customer groups for time-sensitive reorder nudges and promotional offers based on purchase behavior.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-engagement SMS channel to the outreach mix, capturing attention where email alone may not, and driving faster response rates on reorder and win-back efforts.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen, detecting when the weekly Super Session Saturday content is ready.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Removes the need for manual handoff notifications, automatically triggering the email workflow the moment new content arrives.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download link for inclusion in the email.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures the latest file is securely hosted and accessible via a trackable link, enabling download analytics and reliable delivery to recipients.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a perfectly timed weekly email every Saturday without any manual intervention, maintaining consistent engagement with the DFC audience.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-relevant topics and keyword optimization.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Scales B2B content production that would otherwise require specialized automotive copywriters, building organic search authority in high-value commercial segments.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated B2B blog posts to the DFC WordPress site with proper categorization, tagging, and SEO metadata.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a steady publishing cadence that builds domain authority over time, driving organic B2B traffic from shops, distributors, and fleet managers searching for brake solutions.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Detects and pulls the latest Friction Friday video content including title, description, embed link, and thumbnail.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual video tracking and ensures every weekly episode is automatically captured for repurposing across channels.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Generates and publishes a blog post featuring the embedded video, SEO-optimized copy, and relevant metadata.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Drives organic search traffic and provides a permanent content hub for each episode without manual blog creation.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Builds and sends a weekly email campaign to the Friction Friday subscriber list with video highlights and blog link.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Keeps the subscriber base engaged weekly and drives traffic to both the blog and YouTube channel automatically.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends an SMS blast to opted-in contacts promoting the new episode and posts a Teams notification to the internal team confirming distribution.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Maximizes audience reach through SMS while keeping the team informed of each week's successful deployment.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts workflows including site visit triggers, welcome series, and enrollment criteria for gaps and inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken or underperforming automations that may be losing leads or sending irrelevant communications.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Reconfigures and optimizes workflow logic, updates site visit triggers, refines welcome series timing and segmentation, and activates improved automations.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Increases lead conversion rates and ensures new contacts receive timely, relevant nurture sequences that drive engagement and sales.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact details, purchase history, and account status from the Dream ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a single source of truth for customer identity that enables accurate matching and eliminates duplicate or orphaned records.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps and syncs Dream CustomerIDs to corresponding HubSpot contact records, creating custom properties to enable DFC sales automation workflows.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks automated sales workflows tied to real ERP customer data, enabling personalized outreach and accurate pipeline tracking.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping project requirements, defining data sources, and outlining the automation architecture for the bomb file initiative.
Bomb File Project.impact: Establishes a clear project blueprint that prevents scope creep and ensures efficient execution once development begins.

Image Mapping Project for Dream.action: Defining the image mapping schema and planning how product images will be associated with Dream ERP records for automated retrieval.
Image Mapping Project for Dream.impact: Lays the groundwork for automated image delivery across sales and marketing channels, reducing manual image lookup time.

Claudia Automation.action: Gathering requirements and scoping the Claudia automation project including target processes and desired outcomes.
Claudia Automation.impact: Ensures the automation is designed to address the right pain points before any development resources are committed.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Scoping the invoice PDF automation workflow including PDF generation logic, data sources, and delivery method for Shirly.
Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.impact: Prepares a clear automation plan that will eliminate manual invoice creation and reduce billing cycle delays once implemented.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Monitors and captures the latest weekly R1 Concepts YouTube video including metadata, embed link, and thumbnail.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Ensures every new R1 video is immediately queued for multi-channel repurposing without manual intervention.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Auto-generates and publishes an R1-branded blog post with the embedded video, optimized copy, and SEO metadata.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Builds a growing SEO-rich content library that drives organic traffic and gives each video a permanent searchable home.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Creates and distributes a branded weekly email to R1 subscribers featuring the new video and linking to the blog post.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Automates subscriber engagement and drives consistent weekly traffic to both the blog and YouTube without manual email builds.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Triggers an SMS notification to opted-in R1 contacts about the new video and posts a Teams confirmation to the internal marketing team.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Captures mobile-first audience attention via SMS while providing the team with real-time visibility into weekly campaign execution.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest week's performance data from Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates multi-platform ad data automatically, saving hours of manual data gathering across three separate dashboards.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Analyzes the current week's metrics against the previous month's averages, identifies anomalies, and generates a plain-English performance summary with flags.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw ad data into actionable insights instantly, highlighting what needs attention before small issues become costly problems.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Delivers the formatted weekly checkup report to stakeholders via email with key metrics, comparisons, and highlighted alerts.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Puts performance insights directly in decision-makers' inboxes every week, enabling faster optimization decisions without logging into any dashboard.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Extracts full-month performance data from Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA, and audience metrics.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Eliminates the tedious end-of-month data pull across multiple platforms, freeing up hours typically spent compiling raw numbers.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Synthesizes multi-platform monthly data into a structured report formatted for end-of-month presentation slides, including key takeaways and visual-ready data points.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Produces a presentation-ready monthly summary in minutes, replacing hours of manual formatting and narrative writing.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Sends the formatted monthly report to stakeholders via email, ready to be dropped directly into end-of-month slide decks.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Delivers a polished, slide-ready report on schedule every month, ensuring leadership reviews are never delayed by manual report creation.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Pulls customer records who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration form.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Ensures every warranty registrant is captured automatically, eliminating manual list exports and reducing audience lag from days to minutes.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates and formats customer data to match Meta's custom audience requirements, deduplicating and normalizing fields.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Prevents upload errors and duplicate entries, ensuring high audience match rates and clean segmentation on Meta.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Adds validated warranty customers to a custom audience for retargeting and lookalike expansion.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Warranty registrants are automatically retargetable within hours, enabling upsell and loyalty campaigns without any manual audience management.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Extracts performance metrics and ad copy from all active campaigns across Meta and TikTok.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Centralizes cross-platform ad data into one pipeline, saving hours of manual pulling from separate dashboards.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Analyzes ad copy against performance benchmarks, identifies underperformers, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces weak copy with actionable fixes instantly, replacing subjective creative reviews with data-driven optimization guidance.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report with flagged ads and copy improvement recommendations to the paid social team.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act report directly to stakeholders' inboxes, accelerating the optimization cycle from weekly reviews to automated alerts.

Asana Agent.action: Retrieves tasks, due dates, assignees, and status updates from relevant Asana projects.
Asana Agent.impact: Automates task monitoring so nothing falls through the cracks, replacing manual check-ins with real-time data pulls.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes task progress, highlights overdue or at-risk items, and organizes updates into a clear digest.
Asana Agent.impact: Transforms raw project data into an actionable summary, giving managers immediate visibility without reviewing every task individually.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the formatted task summary and alerts to relevant team members via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps the team aligned on priorities and deadlines without requiring everyone to log into Asana, saving time and reducing missed deadlines.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media team meetings in Teams.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Eliminates the need for someone to manually take and distribute meeting notes, ensuring nothing discussed is lost.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the raw meeting content to the processing pipeline for AI analysis.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Bridges the Teams-to-AI handoff seamlessly, ensuring meeting data flows without manual copy-pasting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Extracts action items, assigns owners based on context, sets suggested due dates, and structures them as tasks.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Turns unstructured meeting discussions into clearly defined, assignable tasks in seconds, ensuring accountability and follow-through.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in the appropriate Asana project with assignees, due dates, and descriptions from the meeting.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Every meeting commitment becomes a tracked task automatically, closing the gap between discussion and execution.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls search ad copy, headlines, descriptions, and performance data from all active search campaigns.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Automates the tedious extraction of ad-level data across campaigns, freeing the SEM team from manual reporting.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Benchmarks each ad's copy and performance, identifies underperformers, and generates specific headline and description rewrites.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Provides expert-level copy optimization recommendations at scale, catching weak ads that would otherwise quietly waste budget.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Delivers a structured audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy changes to the search marketing team.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Puts actionable optimization insights directly in front of the team, compressing what was a multi-hour manual audit into an automated email.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the latest data from the Agent Tracker spreadsheet including agent statuses, metrics, and update logs.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Eliminates the need to manually review and summarize raw spreadsheet data each week, ensuring consistent reporting.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw tracker data into a clean, easy-to-read weekly summary with highlights and notable changes.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Transforms a dense spreadsheet into a polished executive-friendly update, saving the author 30+ minutes of formatting each week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the relevant stakeholders.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Stakeholders receive a clear, consistent weekly digest without anyone having to manually compile or send it.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, etc.) through a HubSpot form to initiate the catalog request.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a standardized, repeatable intake process so requests are captured cleanly without back-and-forth emails.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's product catalog and inventory database to find what parts are stocked for the specified vehicle and identify gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly cross-references inventory against vehicle fitment data, replacing hours of manual catalog lookups.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the matched and missing parts into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout organized by category and fitment.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Automates the formatting and organization work that previously required manual spreadsheet assembly, ensuring consistency.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends the completed formatted Excel file to Mark showing DFC's stock coverage and missing inventory for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a ready-to-use catalog document within minutes of the request, compressing a multi-hour manual process into an automated workflow.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order items, and in-transit shipments for backordered parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the manual process of a dozen people doing independent inventory lookups by centralizing live data into one automated pull.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Cross-references the weekly backorder report with live inventory data, enriches each line item with current status, and flags dead-end parts with no sourcing option.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a dynamic, enriched report that instantly shows which orders can be fulfilled and which need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items along with the enriched status report to the team.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Automates customer communication drafting and internal reporting, saving hours of repetitive outreach while keeping customers proactively informed.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile make/model/year fitment data for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates competitor catalog research that would take days of manual browsing, ensuring comprehensive market coverage.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has competitive coverage and where market opportunities exist, enabling data-driven inventory decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Runs automated customer outreach to gather demand data for two-piece rotors across identified vehicle fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before inventory investment, collecting real customer interest data to prioritize product development.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive output that combines competitor intelligence, inventory analysis, and demand data — ready for strategic decision-making.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad copy fields for specific flagged phrases or terms on demand.
Meta Investigation.impact: Enables instant compliance and brand-safety checks across all active ads, replacing the need to manually review hundreds of creatives.

Meta Investigation.action: Matches specified phrases against all ad copy, identifies exact field locations where matches occur, and compiles a flagged list.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints the exact ad and field containing each flagged phrase, making remediation fast and precise instead of a manual search-and-find exercise.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list showing each match with the exact ad, field, and copy where the phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a clear, actionable report that lets the team immediately locate and correct problematic copy across platforms.
